suggested_titles.title: Divided Yellow Ground
suggested_titles.subtitle: An abstract composition builds visual tension through stacked horizontal color fields, depicting nuanced spatial relationships with textured surfaces and subtle symbolic forms.
suggested_titles.description: A prominent bright yellow field anchors the lower-middle section of this layered composition. Above it, dark black and red fields are arranged, while an earthy, scraped ground forms the base. Textured drips descend from the red and black, contrasting with the thick impasto of the yellow and the incised marks below. This deliberate layering evokes a silent, structured landscape under a subdued light. The artwork's vertical format emphasizes the weight and quiet spatial tension of its formal divisions.

suggested_titles.title: Sculpted Red Field
suggested_titles.subtitle: A contemporary abstract work features an intense red upper field, marked by flowing pigment drips and three-dimensionally raised square forms, creating a palpable surface texture.
suggested_titles.description: The upper third presents an intensely textured red field, from which delicate reddish drips fall onto a dark band. Below this, a vibrant yellow expanse stretches above a mixed, earthy territory with subtle markings. Three small, physically raised red squares protrude from the red and black, adding sculptural depth to the varied impasto and scraped layers. The interplay of pigment flow and material presence creates a contemplative and visually complex surface. This work balances its substantial physical surface with a carefully orchestrated visual order.

suggested_titles.title: Horizontal Thresholds
suggested_titles.subtitle: This structural abstract painting employs bold horizontal divisions and contrasting color fields to establish a sense of spatial distance and compositional pressure across its surface.
suggested_titles.description: Stark horizontal lines divide the canvas into distinct territories, emphasizing a horizon line above the earthy base. Red and black fields occupy the upper space, anchoring a luminous yellow band which then meets a grounded, textured lower section. Paint drips create vertical currents across the upper fields, while the yellow field holds a circular form and the lower ground reveals etched, ladder-like details. The resulting visual order evokes a sense of deep quietude and deliberate architectural structure. The interplay of strong divisions and subtle elements generates a quiet, yet powerful, spatial tension.

Preserve the true artwork-to-human scale ratio. The artwork remains curatorially present through framing, lighting, architecture, and human attention, not through physical enlargement. La obra de arte en la imagen adjunta es la obra de arte final que debe presentarse, no una imagen de inspiración, y no debe ser repintada, rediseñada, mejorada, simplificada, extendida, recortada ni reinterpretada. Nunca modifiques la obra de arte en la imagen adjunta. Preserva la obra de arte exactamente como fue proporcionada, incluyendo composición, proporciones, orientación, estructura interna, bordes, colores, textura, pincelada, marcas, símbolos y contenido visual. La obra de arte debe permanecer completamente visible, correctamente proporcionada, montada naturalmente en la pared y curatorialmente presente, sin aumentar su escala física real. Interpreta solo la obra de arte aproximadamente un 20% más pequeña dentro de la composición final que la tendencia por defecto del modelo, aumentando el aire de pared y entorno si es necesario, sin alterar la proporción física real entre la obra y la figura humana. Solo el entorno circundante, la figura humana, la iluminación, la pared, la arquitectura, el mobiliario y la atmósfera pueden ser generados o modificados.
